title: Marek (Módy) Modař
body:
This is a modpack for me and my friends for use on a private server. It is here only for easier sharing, but it is still usable normally. It´s a large kitchen sink modpack, packed with optimization mods and some content and qol mods, also using kilt for some forge mods. If you use this modpack for yourself, using Chunky to pregenerate chunks is necessary for even moderately smooth gameplay due to large amount of terrain generation mods.
